phase.name: Grill-me + auto-mode embeddings across ev-loop / archive / ev-run

contract.goal: Add 3 substrate-wide auto-mode event types (auto-mode-entered, auto-mode-converged, auto-mode-budget-exhausted) to cli/lib/types.ts. Pure type declarations. D2-D4 will emit these from the three skill surfaces gaining the grill-me + auto-mode pattern this phase: /ev-loop-interactive's unit-contract step, /loom-archive's retro, /ev-run's clarifying prompts. Section comment glosses the `surface` field's purpose and clarifies that per-skill `*-budget-exhausted` events remain canonical for which-skill questions; this auto-mode-budget-exhausted is the cross-skill counterpart for griot ingestion of auto-mode patterns.
acceptance_criteria: cli/lib/types.ts adds 3 new EventBase aliases under 'Auto-mode events (Phase 6)' section header.
Names follow established kebab-case sibling pattern.
All 3 wired into Event discriminated union.
surface field typed as string (not literal union) — substrate doesn't enforce enumeration; new auto-mode-capable skills extend without re-extending the type.
Phase 5 PR-merged reconciliation lands in this commit.
rules_applied: PLAN.md Phase 6 lines 443-444 dictates the 3 event names.
Three-phase pattern: D1 grounds the type vocabulary D2-D4 will use.
CLAUDE.md: don't over-engineer — surface field as `string` keeps future skills extensible without re-touching types.ts.
inputs: cli/lib/types.ts (Phase 3 + 4 + 5 event types as the structural model)

actions: Cut branch phase-6-grill-me-auto-mode from main after PR #5 merge.

Extended cli/lib/types.ts with 3 new EventBase aliases (AutoModeEnteredEvent, AutoModeConvergedEvent, AutoModeBudgetExhaustedEvent) under 'Auto-mode events (Phase 6)' section + Event union extension. Section comment explains the surface field + the canonical-vs-cross-skill split between per-skill `*-budget-exhausted` events and auto-mode-budget-exhausted.

Derived evaluator panel (contract-fit + react-api + naming). Invoked /guild-validate. All 3 approved. Naming evaluator surfaced one soft observation about surface:string being wider than a literal union — deliberate tradeoff documented in section comment, not flagged.

changes_since_previous: First unit on this branch. Phase 5 closed on the prior branch (merged via PR #5). The post-merge phase-5 reconciliation (PR state → merged) is in this commit.
notes_for_pr: 3 substrate-wide auto-mode events. D2-D4 will emit these from the 3 surfaces gaining auto-mode this phase. Section comment documents the surface field's intentional widening to `string` for future-extensibility (auto-mode-capable skills coming after this phase don't need to re-extend the type).

Cross-skill vs per-skill budget-exhausted: existing research-budget-exhausted, plan-budget-exhausted, plan-revise-budget-exhausted stay canonical (they carry skill-specific detail). auto-mode-budget-exhausted is the cross-skill counterpart that lets griot ingestion answer 'how often is auto-mode hitting budget caps anywhere in the substrate' without grepping per-skill event names.
